NOTIFICATIONS BY HEADS OF DEPARTMENTS, ETC.
GENERAL  NOTIFICATIONS
Variations to the Approved Master Plan for the Coimbatore Local Planning Area.
(Roc. No.206/2012/LPA-2)
No. VI(1)/148/2014.
In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of Section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning
Act, 1971 (Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972) and in exercise of powers conferred by the G.O. Ms. No. 94, Housing and Urban
Development [(UD4(1)] Department, dated 12-6-2009 which has been published in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette
No. 27, Part II—Section 2, page No. 228, dated 15-7-2009 the following variations are made to the Master Plan for the
Coimbatore Local Planning Area approved under the said Act and and published in the Housing and Urban Development
Department Notification No. II(2)/HOU/4377/94 at Page 1078 of Part II—Section 2 of the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette,
dated the 9th November 1994.
VARIATIONS
In the said Master Plan, in the "LAND USE SCHEDULE" under the heading “COIMBATORE LOCAL PLANNING AREA
(OTHER THAN COIMBATORE CORPORATION AREA)" under the sub-heading (c) Palladam Taluk, No. 91, KANNAMPALAYAM
VILLAGE.
(i)
Against the entry "AGRICULTURAL" (AG 54) for the expression "205 to 211" the expression "205 to 211
(except  206/1A)” shall be substituted.
(ii)
Against the entry "GENERAL INDUSTRIAL (I 38)" the expression "206/1A" shall be added before the
entry 216 to 219.
Coimbatore,
S. CHANDRASEKARAN,
2nd April 2014.
Member-Secretary (In-Charge),
Coimbatore Local Planning Authority.
Variations to the Approved Master Plan for the Coimbatore Local Planning Area.
ERRATA TO NOTIFICATION.
(Roc. No.2428/2010/LPA-2)
No. VI(1)/149/2014.
In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of Section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning
Act, 1971 (Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972) and in exercise of powers conferred by the G.O.Ms. No. 94, Housing and Urban
Development [(UD4(1)] Department, dated 12-6-2009 which has been published in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette,
No. 27 Part II—Section 2, Page No. 228, dated 15-7-2009 the following variatios are made to the Master Plan for the
Coimbatore Local Planning Area approved under the said Act  and published in the Housing and Urban Development
Department, Notification No. II(2)/HOU/4377/94 at Page 1078 of Part II—Section 2 of the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette,
dated the 9th November 1994.
VARIATIONS
In the said Master Plan, in the "LAND USE SCHEDULE" under the heading “Coimbatore Local Planning Area (OTHER
THAN COIMBATORE CORPORATION AREA)" under the sub-heading (a) Notified Detailed Development Plan Area in
Coimbatore Taluk,  No. 12, Kalapatti Village, KALAPATTI DETAILED DEVELOPMENT PLAN No. 1.
(a) Against the entry "Educational" for the expression "NIL" the expression "16/2, 3, 17/2, 18/1AA, 1B, 1C, 1D, 2A,
2B,19/1A, 1B, 2, 20/1, 44/1A1 and 1B"  shall be substituted.
(b) Against the entry "Residential" for the expression "13 to 19 (except 16/2, 3, 17/2, 18/1AA, 1B, 1C, 1D, 2A, 2B,
19/1A, 1B and 2) 20pt, (Except 20/1) 44pt (except 44/1A1, 1B)" shall be substituted.
Coimbatore,
S. CHANDRASEKARAN,
2nd April 2014.
Member-Secretary (In-Charge),
Coimbatore Local Planning Authority.
TAMIL  NADU  GOVERNMENT  GAZETTE

[ Part VI—Sec.1


Variations to the Approved Master Plan for the Coimbatore Local Planning Area.
(Roc. No. 5884/2013/LPA-1)
No. VI(1)/150/2014.
In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of Section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning
Act, 1971 (Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972) and in exercise of powers conferred by the G.O.Ms. No. 94, Housing and Urban
Development [(UD4(1)] Department, dated 12-6-2009 which has been published in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette,
No. 27 Part II—Section 2, Page No. 228, dated 15-7-2009 the following variations are made to the Master Plan for the
Coimbatore Local Planning Area approved under the said Act and  published in the Housing and Urban Development
Department Notification No. II(2)/HOU/4377/94 at page 1078 of Part II—Section 2 of the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette
dated the 9th November 1994.
VARIATIONS
In the said Master Plan, in the "LAND USE SCHEDULE" under the heading “COIMBATORE LOCAL PLANNING AREA
(OTHER THAN COIMBATORE CORPORATION AREA)" under the subheading (b) Non Notified Detailed Development Plan
Area, in Coimbatore Taluk, No. 66, ARISIPALAYAM VILLAGE.
(i)
Against the entry “AGRICULTURAL (AG 34)” for the expression "51 to 71" the expression "51 to 71 (except
53/2A)” shall be substituted.
(ii)
Against the entry "RESIDENTIAL" (PR 20) the expression "53/2A" shall be added before the
entry 135 to 139.
As per G.O. (2D) No. 98, Housing & Urban Development [U.D. 4(1)], Department, dated 25-9-2013, subject to the following
condition.

Preparation of Approved the Singanallur Detailed Development Plan No. 20 of Coimbatore
Local Planning Authority
(Roc. No. 3751/99/LPA-2)
FORM 12
(Under rule 17 of the preparation and sanction of Detailed Development Plan rules.)
No. VI(1)/151/2014.
Under Section 29 of Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning Act, 1971 the Director of Town and Country Planning has
approved Proceedings of the Commissioner of Town and Country Planning Chennai, Roc. No. 18717/2005/DP2
dated 19-12-2012 the Singanallur Detailed Development Plan No. 20 prepared for the Planning Area described below.
(Here enter the area included in the Plan).
Apr. 9, 2014]

SCHEDULE
Singanallur Detailed Development  Plan No. 20
Boundary Description
North
-

East
-
Eastern boundary of S.F.Nos. 270 and 236 (pt) (Channel)
South
-
South by southern boundary of S.F.Nos. 353, 350/2, 450/1, 450/2, 3, 4 Krishnarayapuram Village S.F.No. 5
of Sowripalayam Village (Existing Road)”
West
-
West by Coimbatore D.D.Plan No. 14 boundary Comprising S.F.Nos. 1 to 10, 236(pt), 270, 517 (pt), 518 to
564 of Sowripalayam Village 345 to 352 of Krishnarayapuram Village and 450 Ramanathapuram Village.
Area of the Detailed Development Plan 228.82 Acres (approximate).
(2) If shall come into operation from the date of publication of the notification in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette.
(3) A copy of the map of the area included in the Plan will be kept for inspection and also available for sale, during
office hours in the Office of the Local Planning Authority, for a period of three month.
Coimbatore-12,
S. CHANDRASEKARAN,
2nd April 2014.
Member-Secretary (In-Charge),
Coimbatore Local Planning Authority.
Variations to the New Town Development Plan of Hosur New Town Development Area
(Roc. No.489/2013/HNTDA)
[G.O.Ms.(2D) No. 39, Housing and Urban Development (UD IV-1), dated 4th March 2014.]
No. VI(1)/152/2014.
In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of Section 32 of the Tamil Nadu Town and Country Planning
Act, 1971 (Tamil Nadu Act 35 of 1972) the Governor of Tamil Nadu hereby makes the following variations to the New
Town Development Plan of the Hosur New Town Development Area consented under this said Act and published in the
Housing and Urban Development Department Notification No. 12 at Page Nos. 159, 160 of Part VI—Section I, of the
Tamil Nadu Government Gazette  dated the 26th March 2003.
VARIATIONS
In the said Hosur New Town Development Plan under the heading "Industrial use zone" in Belagondapalli Village and
Panchayat, the expression of S.F. Nos. 364/2F and 370/2A with an extent of 1.65 acres (0.67.0 Hectares) subject to the
condition that appropriate buffer zone shall be provided to the High Tension electric tower line area in the site at the time
of proposed development of construction shall be added.
Under the heading "Agricultural wet use zone" in Belagondapalli Village and Panchayat, the expression
of S.F.Nos. 364/2F and 370/2A with an extent of 1.65 acres (0.67.0 hectares) shall be deleted.
Hosur,
P. RANGANATHAN,
26th March 2014.
Member-Secretary (In-Charge),
Hosur New Town Development Authority.

[ Part VI—Sec.1


Original Suits for the Year 1985, 1986, 1987, 2000 and 2001 in the City Civil Court, Chennai-600 104.
JUDICIAL  NOTIFICATIONS
DESTRUCTION OF RECORDS IN THE CITY CIVIL COURT, CHENNAI.
(Dis. No. 3761/2014/R.K.I, dated 26th March 2014.)
No. VI(1)/153/2014.
It is hereby notified for the information of parties and witnesses that under the rule for the destruction of Part-I records framed
by High Court of judicature at Madras under V of 1917, printed at pages 311 to 317 of the volume I of the Civil Rules of Practice
and circular orders, all documents produced by them and filed as exhibits in the original suits and connected appeals, original
petitions and Applications in the City Civil Court at Chennai mentioned in the schedule hereto and all other documents which have
been tendered but either have not been taken or rejected in the Original Suits. Applications and Original Petitions mentioned in the
said schedule be destroyed after thirty days from the date of publication.
